prompt: Dark cinematic reveal, deep navy background, bold Chinese title '交易期望值计算器' emerges from light rays, dramatic upward camera drift, premium financial UI glowing with violet accent light.
Sleek smartphone held at angle on dark surface, finger taps the price input field, '100' types in with subtle haptic ripple, soft purple glow pulses around the active field.
Close-up smartphone screen, hand scrolls to position size field, enters '1', UI elements animate smoothly, violet highlights cascade downward, cinematic shallow depth of field.
Fluid downward camera pan follows fingertip scrolling, probability distribution section rises into frame with elegant motion, glowing target icons pulse in deep navy interface.
Macro shot of screen, new price target row materializes with smooth fade animation, probability percentage fills in, multiple scenario rows glow sequentially in rich violet gradient.
Expected value result card dramatically slides into frame, bold glowing numbers pulse with golden-violet light, camera slowly pushes in, dark background shimmers with particle depth.
Minimalist deep navy card, '交易期望值计算器' text fades in elegantly centered, tagline appears below in clean white type, 'Try it free' button blooms with violet accent glow.
